positive: A stylized, whimsical celestial fox portrait, depicted as a graceful silhouette against a vibrant cosmic nebula background. The fox should have flowing, ethereal tails and pointed ears, embodying elegance and mystery. Use high contrast colors: deep indigo, sapphire blue, vibrant magenta, and gold accents for the stars and nebula clouds. The composition must be centered and perfectly symmetrical, suitable for printing on a t-shirt. Integrate abstract elements like crescent moons, shooting stars, and crystalline geometric patterns surrounding the fox. The style should blend Art Nouveau ornamentation with modern vector graphic clarity. Detailed linework, perfect composition, clean edges, print-ready.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, messy, cartoon, childish, extra limbs, disfigured, noise, artifacts, low contrast, poor quality
